description: CompositionBlack sweatshirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester fabric with internal soft fleece feel, has a hood with drawstrings, central zip fastening, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two hand-warmer pockets on front, ribbed hem, distressed branding printed on left chest and back and embroidered and appliquéd embellishments on backFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside outDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool iron inside outCool surfing brand quiksilver has a great range of casual clothing to suit style conscious dressers who have active lifestyles. The fleece fabric has a luxuriously soft feel inside which will keep you warm in chilly weather, while the funky print on the back leaves no doubt about your excellent fashion sense. Wear this sweatshirt with jeans and comfortable footwear from the wide collection available at myntra.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
